title: Add MCP preset install/uninstall UI to frontend setup page
goal: 프론트엔드 setup 페이지에 MCP 프리셋 섹션을 추가한다. GET /setup/mcp/presets로 프리셋 목록을 조회하고 Install/Uninstall 버튼으로 원클릭 설치/삭제를 제공한다.

test_requirements.expected: function calls GET /setup/mcp/presets and returns preset list

test_requirements.case: Setup page shows MCP Presets section
test_requirements.expected: section with preset cards showing name, description, installed status

test_requirements.case: Install button triggers install and refreshes state
test_requirements.expected: button calls installMcpPreset then refetches presets

constraints: MCP Presets section appears after the External Connections section
Follow existing card patterns from the setup page
Do not add new npm dependencies
